task_completion.description: Verify that the imaging request form or interface has been opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An active window, tab, or modal displaying an imaging request or order form.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct patient is selected for the imaging request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Maria Santos' and/or ID 'P0001' (or 'p1_0001') is visible in the patient selection or patient details field of the imaging request form.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Imaging Type is set to 'X-ray'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, radio button, or text field labeled 'Imaging Type' (or similar) shows 'X-ray' as the selected or entered value.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required clinical indication is included in the notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text area or notes field contains the phrases 'Chest PA and lateral', 'persistent chest pain', and 'Rule out pulmonary pathology'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the imaging request is successfully saved in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Request saved', 'Order submitted'), a confirmation screen, or the new X-ray request appearing in the patient's medical record/imaging list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface of the medical/EMR system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with a GUI application or web browser, not terminal commands or scripts bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the information into the actual system rather than a generic text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient name, imaging type, and notes are entered into the specific fields of the medical software's form, not a notepad or word processor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually triggered the save or submit action.
integrity.visual_evidence: The cursor or a visual highlight shows interaction with a 'Save', 'Submit', or 'Create' button, followed by a genuine system response.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Maria Santos. Patient ID: P0001 (system ID may appear as p1_0001). Imaging Type: X-ray. Required Notes must include: 'Chest PA and lateral', 'persistent chest pain', and 'Rule out pulmonary pathology'.
